history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A colorful mobile game screen shows a character/plant themed field with multiple floating item bubbles and timers, titled “WibuPet.”

Setting:
The image is an indoor/outdoor-unclear, game-like interface with a bright green background resembling a grassy area and stylized trees, laid out in a top-down view. Lighting is bright and even, with no real-world shadows, and it appears like daytime based on the cheerful, outdoor-themed illustration.

Main Subject:
The main focus is the “WibuPet” game interface showing a cluster of small illustrated characters and tree blossoms, each surrounded by white rounded speech-bubble-like labels containing icons and time values.

Visual Details:
At the top, a dark status bar spans the width with signal and battery icons. Below it, the app header area is light green. A large circular back button with a left-pointing arrow sits on the left, next to the title text “WibuPet” in dark blue. On the right side, there is a circular button with a music note icon and a rounded pill-shaped counter area displaying a blue crystal icon followed by “217/4.”  
In the middle of the screen, the background is a flat, bright green. Several stylized round trees with trunks are scattered: one large tree on the upper right, smaller trees on the left and center, and a tree near the top center with pink blossom clusters. Small light green sparkles and dotted particles appear around some characters and blossoms.  
Multiple cartoon creatures appear as small chibi figures with pale beige limbs and animal-like heads or faces. Some have hats or hair-like shapes, and one visible character on the lower right has a blue cap and glasses-like face markings. Another character in the lower left wears a straw hat and blue clothing.  
Floating labels appear near each element: white rounded rectangles containing a blue crystal icon and text like “6h 59m” or “23h 59m,” and some labels include a circular letter icon (for example “E” or “R”) followed by short names that repeat across different labels. Some labels overlap blossoms and characters, suggesting interactive timers.  
The bottom of the screen shows three large rounded buttons: a pink left button labeled “Gacha” with a white egg-like icon; a green center button labeled “Kelola” with a small pink creature icon and a small “10/10” counter badge; and a white right button labeled “Katalog” with a book-like icon. A faint landscape curve and layered green hills appear near the bottom, along with a brownish circular shape partly visible on the left.

Visible Text:

Practical Summary:
The image is a screenshot of a mobile game screen titled “WibuPet,” showing a bright green outdoor-themed field with cartoon characters and blossom trees. It includes multiple floating timer labels and bottom navigation buttons for “Gacha,” “Kelola,” and “Katalog.”
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
